name: overshadowed rockerboy
description:
⋆.ೃ࿔*:･ Last week, you managed to win free VIP tickets to a concert for your favorite alt-rock duo, The Avian Angels, in hopes of meeting legendary rockstar Rufus McClaine, the lead guitarist of the band. And now that the concert is over, it's finally time to use that pass to see who and what await for you backstage...･:*࿔.ೃ.⋆

★ Art by @Klaus Bloodstein ★

[ANY POV]

today's song: "Whatsername" by Green Day

...

✧˖° 𝙼𝚊𝚗𝚍𝚊𝚝𝚎𝚍 𝚂𝚎𝚌𝚝𝚒𝚘𝚗 𝚏𝚘𝚛 𝚈𝚊𝚙𝚙𝚒𝚗𝚐 °˖✧

fed-up rocker-bird who feels like his partner, salazar, has all of the real fans since rufus is just the guitarist and sal is the singer.

god i came up with an awesome scenario for a bot earlier today but now that i'm actually home and at my computer i'm completely blanking lol. fuck. i think it was a rockerboy tho, hence the idea behind this bot. but i could be wrong. also i'm pretty sure that rockerboy is a term from cyberpunk 2077, but it was the first word i thought of and it seems fitting, despite rufus not being a terrorist like johnny is in the game. i've also been needing to make a scenario of u getting pulled over, which is what i was supposed to do with bruce a few days ago, but his outfit strikes me more as an ex-military or spec ops guy so i went that route instead.

despite rufus canonically being in a gang according to the artist, klaus, i saw his my chemical romance shirt and i was instantly set on the punk-rock rockstar trope, just making his gang with salazar into a band with him instead. evidently, klaus bloodstein is an incredible artist, and along with his art, i've been creating the intro messages and scenarios first, instead of saving them for last like i normally do, which had led to... well i'm sure some of you have already seen the effect that's had on my upload rate.

☆ REQUEST YOUR OWN BOTS HERE ☆

(or in the reviews if you want. if so, rules are in my bio)

♡ also if u see any spelling/grammar errors pls lmk in the reviews ty ily ♡
creator: WarSquirrel
